Changelog

All notable changes to the HealthZen Pro project will be documented in this file.

[Unreleased]

Working on "Dr. HealthZen" Voice Mode integration.

Planning to migrate local storage to Firebase Cloud Firestore for multi-device sync.

[1.0.0] - 2026-02-10

Added

PWA Support: Added manifest.json, sw.js, and offline.html for full installability.

Legal Core: Added comprehensive privacy.html and terms.html compliant with IT Act 2000.

SEO Suite: Integrated sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and OpenSearch protocols.

Security: Added security.txt for vulnerability reporting.

UI/UX:

New "Glassmorphism" dashboard design.

Advanced 404 Error page with animations.

Mobile-first responsive layout with Tailwind CSS.

Fixed

Fixed layout shift on mobile devices when keyboard opens.

Resolved meta tag duplication in main.html.

Changed

Migrated from vanilla CSS to Tailwind CSS utility classes.

Updated script.js to handle Guest Mode persistence.

[0.5.0] - 2025-12-01

Added

Basic calorie tracking functionality.

Initial CSV data import for Food and Exercises.

LocalStorage based user profile.

Maintained by Mitanshu Bhasin
